scripts.postinstall: cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install
scripts.dev: concurrently "docker compose --env-file .env.local up" "cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=local bun run dev" "cd frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "docker compose --env-file .env.local up" "cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=local bun run dev" "cd frontend && bun run preview"
